transcript: Now, I [beep] need to bring you your monkey. When would be the best time for that one?
I don't know, I just want to know if you shocked my monkey. 'Cause if you shocked my monkey, I don't want him back.
I'm gonna fracture your lip. How's that sound?
Oh yeah. You talk big now, huh? I get downtown, you gonna be h... so... so, uh, pleasantly surprised. I'll tell you that right now.
No, I think I will be pleasantly surprised to find out that you are just a little wimpy-ass-- '[beep]' --man.
[laugh] Who am I talking with, sir?
You talking with Bob E. Sackett.
Bobby Sackett, like a sack of shit or somethin'? Haha, burn on that one.
Are you tryin'-- '[beep]' --to make fun of my name? Better just stay out of my life!
By the way, what's that damn beep?
It's me makin' a waffle out of your face. How's that sound?
You making waffles with your dick? I don't care if you're into bestiality, but just don't do it with my monkey.
I'm gonna make a monkey outta ya.
Monkey outta me? Monkey outta you.
Uh, monkey see, monkey do. Burn.
Burn? Where... wh... wha... wha... where are you getting this "burn" thing from?
Where does it come from? '[beep]' Does it come from deep from within?
Comes from my fist upside your cheek. Burn again.
You. You're gonna be with it. Burn again. Triple burn. Whoo!
Burn? '[beep]' Where... what is this thing with "burn"? I'm not burning. You're not burning.
Oh, hey. [beep] Uh, we [unintelligible] on ya. I didn't know who this was. I was just prepared to be [unintelligible].
Hey, [unintelligible], what are you doing, dude?
